items.title: Qualcomm forms a "coalition" to launch 6G in 2029 and unveils the FastConnect 8800, an "AI-native" Wi-Fi 8-ready NIC that doubles peak speeds over Wi-Fi 7 (Will Sattelberg/9to5Google)
items.title_en: Qualcomm forms a "coalition" to launch 6G in 2029 and unveils the FastConnect 8800, an "AI-native" Wi-Fi 8-ready NIC that doubles peak speeds over Wi-Fi 7 (Will Sattelberg/9to5Google)
items.title_zh: 高通组建“联盟”，计划在 2029 年推出 6G，并推出 FastConnect 8800，这是一款“AI 原生”Wi-Fi 8 就绪网卡，峰值速度是 Wi-Fi 7 的两倍（Will Sattelberg/9to5Google）
